title: M家庄少－百搭护眼｜Block Grid
description: 想要在自己喜欢的材质上也能不眼瞎数格子？试试百搭包吧！｜Add a grid to the block, eye-friendly and easy to count, support All-Types resource pack
body:
想要在自己喜欢的材质上也能不眼瞎数格子？试试百搭包吧！

百搭包本体放在资源包列表最上面，搭配sodium钠食用更佳

作者：[M家庄少](https://space.bilibili.com/177225410/)

---

Want to Measuring the length of blocks in your favourite resourcepack without being blind? Try this pack!

Put this resourcepack on the top of resourcepack list, recommended to use with sodium mod.

Author: [M家庄少](https://space.bilibili.com/177225410/)
